reason: Verified that the Super Agent can execute browser commands and correctly retrieve the page title from https://example.com
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Successfully loaded the Super Agent interface with list of agents
Found and clicked the "QA-20260331-000752-h8xs" agent in the sidebar - Successfully selected the agent and opened the chat interface
Typed and sent the message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." - Successfully submitted the message to the agent
Waited for agent response - Agent completed the task within 13 seconds (well under the 3-minute timeout)
Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - Successfully confirmed the agent returned "The page title is Example Domain." in the response
